title: Ripple Click Animation

statement.markdown:
## Interactive Ripple Click Effect

Build an interactive click handler creating water ripple animations centered on click coordinates.

### Requirements:
1. **Dynamic positioning**: Button clicks read client relative coordinates, centering ripple spans at mouse positions.
2. **Fade Scale transformations**: Ripples scale up and fade out to `opacity: 0` in dynamic cycles.
3. **DOM Cleaning**: Automatically clean up and delete ripple span nodes after animations finish (e.g. 600ms).

constraints: Must programmatically calculate mouse click locations (offsetX, offsetY) or client bounds
Do not leave residual ripple element spans in the DOM

starterCode.javascript:
const btn = document.getElementById('ripple-btn');

// Implement click handler spawning ripples and cleanup timeouts here

gradingCriteria.description: Verify ripple coordinates center correctly on click positions.
Verify ripple tags fade, scale, and clear from the DOM after 600ms.
